preventive_sms.chat_reply: This looks like a classic scam lure trying to bait you with a fake reward link. Since you haven't clicked anything or shared any details, there is no sign of compromise and you don't need to worry. Just delete the message and block the sender to stay safe.
preventive_sms.summary: An unsolicited SMS promising a VIP gift via a suspicious link was identified as a phishing attempt.
preventive_sms.conversational_reply: You did the right thing by checking first. This is just a bait message, and since you didn't interact with it, your accounts and data are perfectly safe.

informational_apk.chat_reply: This APK appears to be an intentionally insecure application used for security training and developer education. Since you have not installed it or shared any personal data, there is no risk to your device or accounts. You can safely delete the file.
informational_apk.summary: The file is a known vulnerable application used for security testing and does not indicate an active scam attempt.
informational_apk.conversational_reply: It looks like you've come across a testing tool used by developers to learn about security. Since you haven't interacted with it, you're completely safe and don't need to take any formal action.

real_compromise.chat_reply: This is a serious situation because you've shared sensitive banking details and money has already been taken from your account. You need to treat this as an active compromise and act immediately to stop further losses. Please follow the steps below to secure your bank account and report the incident right away.
real_compromise.summary: The user shared OTP and banking details via a phishing link resulting in unauthorized financial loss.
real_compromise.conversational_reply: I'm sorry this happened, but we need to act fast to protect your remaining funds. Since you've already lost money and shared your bank details, the priority is freezing your accounts and reporting the theft to the authorities immediately.

ui_chat_reply_first.bot_text: This message looks like bait, but from what you shared there is no direct compromise right now. So don't panic and just block it.
ui_chat_reply_first.chat_reply: This message looks like bait, but from what you shared there is no direct compromise right now. So don't panic and just block it.
ui_chat_reply_first.summary: Likely scam lure with no confirmed compromise reported.
